# Complete LLM Documentation for Match Ticket

# Title: Match Ticket — Turf Booking & Ground Management Software
# Entity: Match Ticket (Owned & Operated by Buyp Technologies Private Limited)
# URL: https://matchticket.in
# Industry: Sports Technology, Sports Facility Software, Venue Reservation Systems

---

## Executive Summary

Match Ticket is a complete cloud-based turf booking and sports ground management software platform designed for turf owners and sports venue managers across India. Developed by Buyp Technologies Private Limited (CIN: U72900TN2021PTC141881), Match Ticket automates online slot reservations, eliminates double bookings, tracks customer payments, and provides real-time business insights for football turfs, box cricket arenas, badminton courts, pickleball courts, and multi-sport complexes.

---

## Key Features & Capabilities

### 1. Slot Management & Real-Time Booking Engine
- Prevents double bookings using instant slot locking upon checkout initiation.
- Allows customizable slot durations (30 min, 60 min, 90 min, 2 hours).
- Provides peak and off-peak dynamic pricing rules based on time of day, weekend, or holiday schedules.
- Supports offline booking entry by venue managers with instant dashboard synchronization.

### 2. Multi-Venue Management
- Manage single or multiple turf locations from a unified owner dashboard.
- Individual pricing, amenities, working hours, and staff permissions per location.

### 3. Customer & Financial Analytics
- Complete customer booking history, phone records, and repeat visitor tracking.
- Instant UPI, Credit/Debit Card, Net Banking online payment integration.
- Daily, weekly, and monthly revenue reports, pending payment tracking, and payout statements.

---

## Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)

### Q: What is Match Ticket?
A: Match Ticket is a turf booking and ground management software platform that enables sports facility owners to manage online bookings, slot schedules, payments, and customers from one centralized dashboard.

### Q: How does Match Ticket prevent double bookings?
A: Match Ticket uses a real-time slot synchronization engine. As soon as a user selects a slot to book, it is temporarily held and marked unavailable across all customer and admin views.

### Q: What sports grounds are supported?
A: Match Ticket supports Football Turfs, Box Cricket Turfs, Badminton Courts, Tennis Courts, Pickleball Arenas, Basketball Courts, Swimming Pools, and Multi-Sport Arenas.

### Q: What plans are available for turf owners?
A: 
- **Starter Plan**: Free entry plan for small turfs looking to digitize basic slot schedules.
- **Pro Plan (₹1,299/mo or ₹11,999/yr)**: Full booking automation, online payment gateway, analytics, custom domain, and WhatsApp notification alerts.
- **Elite Plan (₹2,999/mo or ₹27,999/yr)**: Multi-branch support, dedicated account manager, API integrations, and custom branding.

---
